messages.message: React Hook useMemo has missing dependencies: 'defaultMetrics.avgResponseTime', 'defaultMetrics.cacheHitRate', 'defaultMetrics.completionRate', 'defaultMetrics.dailyActiveUsers', and 'defaultMetrics.reliability'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [defaultMetrics.avgResponseTime, defaultMetrics.cacheHitRate, defaultMetrics.completionRate, defaultMetrics.dailyActiveUsers, defaultMetrics.reliability, metrics?.activeSessionsChange, metrics?.avgResponseTime, metrics?.cacheHitRate, metrics?.cacheHitRateChange, metrics?.completionRate, metrics?.dailyActiveUsers, metrics?.reliability, metrics?.reliabilityChange, metrics?.responseTimeChange, metrics?.systemLoadChange]

fix.text: [defaultMetrics.avgResponseTime, defaultMetrics.cacheHitRate, defaultMetrics.completionRate, defaultMetrics.dailyActiveUsers, defaultMetrics.reliability, metrics?.activeSessionsChange, metrics?.avgResponseTime, metrics?.cacheHitRate, metrics?.cacheHitRateChange, metrics?.completionRate, metrics?.dailyActiveUsers, metrics?.reliability, metrics?.reliabilityChange, metrics?.responseTimeChange, metrics?.systemLoadChange]
